parts.title: SKILL 9: USE NOUN CLAUSE CONNECTORS CORRECTLY
parts.instruction: A noun clause is a clause that functions as a noun; because the noun clause is a noun, it is used in a sentence as either an object of a verb, an object of a preposition, or the subject of the sentence.

questions.question: When the season starts is determined by the weather.

reason.en: The sentence is correct. 'When the season starts' functions as a noun clause acting as the subject of the sentence, and 'is determined' is the main verb.
reason.id: Kalimat tersebut benar. 'When the season starts' berfungsi sebagai klausa kata benda yang bertindak sebagai subjek kalimat, dan 'is determined' adalah kata kerja utamanya.

reason.en: This option is incorrect because the sentence structure follows the rules for a noun clause acting as a subject.
reason.id: Opsi ini salah karena struktur kalimat tersebut sudah mengikuti aturan klausa kata benda yang berfungsi sebagai subjek.

parts.title: SKILL 10: USE NOUN CLAUSE CONNECTOR/SUBJECTS CORRECTLY
parts.instruction: Some cases a noun clause connector is not just a connector; a noun clause connector can also be the subject of the clause at the same time.

questions.question: The game show contestant was able to respond to whatever was asked.

reason.en: The sentence is correct because 'whatever' functions as both the noun clause connector and the subject of the verb 'was asked' within the noun clause 'whatever was asked', which acts as the object of the preposition 'to'.
reason.id: Kalimat ini benar karena 'whatever' berfungsi sebagai penghubung klausa kata benda sekaligus subjek dari kata kerja 'was asked' di dalam klausa kata benda 'whatever was asked', yang bertindak sebagai objek dari preposisi 'to'.

reason.en: This option is incorrect because the sentence structure follows the grammatical rules for noun clause connectors acting as subjects.
reason.id: Opsi ini salah karena struktur kalimat tersebut sudah mengikuti aturan tata bahasa untuk penghubung klausa kata benda yang berfungsi sebagai subjek.

parts.title: SKILL 11: USE ADJECTIVE CLAUSE CONNECTORS CORRECTLY
parts.instruction: An adjective clause is a clause that describes a noun. Because the clause is an adjective, it is positioned directly after the noun that it describes.
